summary: Systematic nonexistence attack on H(668): global obstruction sweep at 668, srg(333) DNE mechanisms, hypothetical-object profile

result.report:
# H(668) DNE ATTEMPT — FINAL SYNTHESIS REPORT
*Synthesis lead, 2026-06-10. Inputs: 12-machinery global sweep, 8 mechanism attacks, 3 profile documents, adversarial verification. Twelve load-bearing arithmetic facts independently re-verified this session (stdlib Python, all PASS: 668=2²·167, ord₁₆₇(2)=83, 333=18²+3², BRC witness (1,1,1), 167⁷≡−1 mod 29, v₂ margin, excess witness 4303/27889, two-graph multiplicity non-integrality at 668, σ≤17212<17264).*

---

## 1. VERDICT LINE

**Nothing obstructs H(668).** Every known nonexistence machinery, instantiated and machine-verified at 668 for the first time, either provably cannot fire or passes with explicit witness — usually with large margin, and in several cases with a closed-form proof that the machinery can never fire at *any* Hadamard order. The single `obstruction_found` result (no (667,333,166) difference set in Z₆₆₇) survived adversarial verification but is **prior art** (La Jolla DB: "Mann Test") and kills only the Z₆₆₇-regular construction corner, not H(668). No new compute, at any budget, converts the current mathematics into a nonexistence proof: the rigid/asymmetric sector is blocked by a missing structural theorem, not by hardware (gap ≥ 2¹⁰⁰ over the universal computation bound). The publishable deliverable is the certified cannot-fire catalog below.

---

## 2. THE CATALOG (publishable core)

Verdict legend: **CF** = cannot fire, provably (structural reason, witness-certified) · **P** = passes (necessary conditions hold; no kill) · **NEW** = first instantiation at 668/334/333 in print, per careful literature check.

| # | Machinery | Verdict at 668 | Why (one line) | New at 668? | Conf |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| 1 | Excess / maxdet bounds (Hadamard, Barba, Ehlich–Wojtas, Best, Sharpe minors, 2-adic det) | **CF** | Barba/EW apply only at odd / ≡2 mod 4 orders; all forced minor/bordering checks pass with margins 13.45×–828.9×; closed form Barba(n−1)/n^{n/2−1} ≥ 1.118 ∀n≥4 — never fires at any order. Refined excess σ(668) ≤ 17212 (< Best floor 17264) with exact IP witness | **NEW** (margins, σ≤17212, neighbor unattainability 1333/1337/1330/1338) | 0.92 |
| 2 | Code mass formulas / self-dual codes (F₂, Z₄, F₁₆₇; Gleason, shadows, Assmus–Mattson) | **CF** | 2-adic code functor is *constant* at n≡4 mod 8: every H(668) yields E₆₆₈, F₂⁶⁶⁷, Klemm K₆₆₈, D₆₆₈⁺ — all exist unconditionally; the two empty families (doubly-even, Type II) are provably not produced | **NEW** as assembled certified statement (collapse known generically: Solé/Charnes, Munemasa) | 0.93 |
| 3 | Turyn/Schmidt field descent & self-conjugacy (24-pair sweep, all decompositions) | **CF** | All necessary routes are multi-norm; the only two-norm lemma (LMO/Schmidt–Tan) is triply vacuous (167²∤668, moduli not 167-powers); CRT parity clash kills self-conjugacy at 111/333; every forced relaxation has explicit cyclotomic witness incl. 668=(2r)²+(2s)² at the srg eigenvalues. Does kill 3 sufficient-only subroutes (abelian RDS(668,2,668,334), two ±1 circulants of order 334, Golay transversals) | **NEW** (full sweep; published tables stop at m≤100 / 4u² orders) | 0.93 |
| 4 | Weighing-matrix / OD ladders ([N1]–[N7], Ghaderpour, Radon–Hurwitz) | **CF** | Implication runs the wrong way (W/OD ⇒ H, never H ⇒ lower-weight W); zero weights excluded at n≡0 mod 4; Ghaderpour's 109 forbidden skew weights miss 667=1²+15²+21². Side kill: unbordered two-block-circulant H(668) impossible (a²+b²=668 insoluble) | **NEW** | 0.93 |
| 5 | Global spectral battery at srg(333,166,82,83) (Krein, absolute, Neumaier/KLMP-2025, Terwilliger, star-complement, BPR) | **CF** | Irrationality gate: Neumaier lineage excludes conference graphs by hypothesis; symbolic margins (v−5)/4 and (v−5)(v+1)/8 positive for all v>5; Terwilliger interval degenerates to [s,r] exactly at conference parameters; Paley(337) realizes the identical bound profile 4 vertices away | Partially in print (Brouwer table '?'); margins + fire-impossibility certificates **NEW** | 0.96 |
| 6 | p-rank / SNF / critical group (p = 2,3,37,83,167) | **CF** | SNF of any H(668) uniquely forced: diag(1,2³³³,334³³³,668) — a parameter function with one consistent value has zero discriminating power; srg SNF (1¹⁶⁶,83¹⁶⁶,166) totally forced; only freedom is 3-rank window [6,166] at C(334), provably unpinnable by oddity/Milgram (37-part absorbs parity) | **NEW** (Newman 1971 covers it generically, never at 668) | 0.93 |
| 7 | Quadratic forms / Hasse invariants / BRC / integral lattices | **CF** | (668,668)₁₆₇ = −1 is real but annihilated by even exponent C(668,2) — structural for all n≡0 mod 4; BRC at (667,333,166) has universal witness (1,1,1) since n−λ=1 (dead for the whole Hadamard conjecture); explicit integral witness M = I₁₆₇⊗[[25,5,3,3],…] with MMᵀ=668I | **NEW** (p=167 trace + lattice witness) | 0.97 |
| 8 | Regular two-graphs / equiangular lines at (167, 1/√333, 334) | **CF** | One-way firewall (C(334) ⇒ H(668) only); no nontrivial regular two-graph exists on 668 or 1336 points at all (multiplicities 4843/13); at 334 the only tight bound is the relative bound — equality *is* the existence hypothesis; LP optimum exactly 334, runner-up 40,793× away; JTYZZ regime inapplicable (k(λ)=∞) | **NEW** at line-system level (tables stop at d≈43) | 0.93 |
| 9 | Cocyclic / Hadamard groups (12 extensions of order 1336) | **CF** within scope | 10 of 12 groups provably contain no RDS(668,2,668,334) (incl. the Z[ζ₈] norm-668 emptiness, the unique kill for cyclic Sylow-2); survivors Q₈×Z₁₆₇ (Williamson-167) and Dic₃₃₄ (Ito-167) pass all character tests; framework machine-validated at order 24 | Reduction in print (BACD 2019, names 668); **explicit 12-group kill table NEW** | 0.93 |
| 10 | Butson / complex Hadamard descent (BH(334,4), BH(668,q), Leung–Schmidt F-bound) | **CF** | All morphisms point toward H(668); field descent exactly vacuous: F(668,334)=668, F(334,334)=334; norm witness (1+i)g₁₆₇ of absolute value √334; two-squares port disproved by BH(6,4)=C₆+iI counterexample | **NEW** | 0.90 |
| 11 | Design intersection: SBIBD(667,333,166), BRC, multipliers, difference sets | **CF** for H(668); **fires on corner** | BRC permanently trivial at Hadamard parameters; Wilbrink/Haemers inapplicable; multiplier+Turyn kill: **no (667,333,166)-DS in any group of order 667** (two independent certified proofs) — corner only, and **prior art** (La Jolla DB "Mann Test"; subsumed by Song–Golomb 1994) | Result known; explicit 24-candidate certificate at 667 NEW | 0.96 |
| 12 | 2018–2026 nonexistence technology (KK mod-3 PSD, BACD cocyclic, recent SRG methods, splittable/BWM, SAT+CAS gates) | **P** | KK spectrum at ℓ=333 non-empty: exactly 8 admissible [Â,B̂] pairs of 28 (71% pruning filter, 0% kill); everything else provably inapplicable (167 non-square, λ=82 dense, 667 squarefree, parity clash mod 333) | **NEW** (KK published spectra stop at ℓ≤147) | 0.92 |

**Mechanism attacks (8), all negative for DNE:** SA-floor lower bound — min F>0 not provable by any affine/parity/mod-m invariant (79-dim invariant space fully characterized, all constants 0), McCormick LP relaxation exactly 0, trace moments collapse; *bonus theorem-grade necessary condition*: Paley-pinning of D₇₇ + per-orbit coupling (C1)/(C2), violated by all 12 archived floor states. I5 nilpotency gate — refuted (invariant constant across non-isomorphic lifts); *proven corollary*: fpf Z₃₇ forces 3-rank(A−I) ≤ 149 at 333. Kajiura–Matsumoto — variance gate identically degenerate (2k²=ν+λv), all decided levels feasible with certified witnesses; one open cell L(111). Twisted moments — all 7 skeleton classes CP-SAT feasible, window widths ≥1032; banked sound cuts (F₀≥198 on QR, QNR defect ≥162, PSD on Z₃₆). srg global synthesis — mass/counting provably circular; star-complement maximally mismatched; rigid-case cost ≥10¹⁶⁰⁰⁰. LP mod-37 spectrum — joint (mod 3, mod 37) gate provably open via Gauss-sum certificates, all 504 CRT states jointly feasible. SBIBD — corner kill (above). Corner bookkeeping — 12 corners DEAD with certificates, 10 OPEN with quantified costs, 1 erratum fixed (PROBLEM_ANALYSIS_668.md §2: D₃₃₄, Dic₁₆₇ are non-abelian; kill survives).

---

## 3. LIVE THREADS

**Survived verification (1):**
- **No (667,333,166) difference set in any group of order 667** (mech: SBIBD; verified `holds=true` by adversarial review, both proofs independently replicated, La Jolla DB confirmed by live query). Status: prior art, corner-scoped. **Exact next step** (sound, from the verified repaired form): port the self-conjugacy valuation analysis to LP(333) — 167 *is* self-conjugate mod 9 (167³≡−1) and mod 37 (167¹⁸≡−1); the pair equation |χ(A)|²+|χ(B)|²=668 is two-norm so the Mann argument does not port verbatim, but the P-adic valuation analysis at primes above 167 in Z[ζ₉], Z[ζ₃₇] on the exact LP character identities has not been carried out. Cost: days of desk work. Note the field-descent sweep (machinery #3) already exhibits witnesses for the relaxations |X|²+|Y|²=167 at d=37, so expectation is cannot-fire — but that specific valuation analysis at the 167-part is the one unchecked cell, and either outcome is catalog material.

**Best undecided_needs_compute, ranked by (stakes × cheapness):**

| Item | What | Cost | Stakes |
|---|---|---|---|
| **L(111) decision** (KM mechanism) | 222 integer vars in [0,3], 55 correlation equalities; Eisenstein reformulation: 148 small-range vars + 72 quadratic equalities, CP-SAT/algebraic hybrid | ~$10²–10³, days | Asymmetric: INFEASIBLE ⇒ LP(333) DNE ⇒ (via project equivalence, **see audit flag in §5**) H(668) DNE. Expected outcome: feasible, closing the KM entry |
| **sc_pinned_cpsat full budget** | 6 open (cls,perm) instances × 2 branches × ≥2.5h × 8 workers, with new (C1)/(C2) Paley-pinning | ~$10²; +port pinning into sc_anneal.cpp | INFEASIBLE on all ⇒ classes 221/422 closed at class-109 trust level — finishes the self-complementary corner |
| **36×36 projector-Gram SDP** (twisted-moment residue) | Per-class invariant SDP, minutes each | trivial | Last untested level of that lens; likely auto-feasible |
| **Eades 1977 ANU thesis** (negacyclic C(334)) | Literature retrieval/verification | ~$0 | Converts B13 from kill-pending to DEAD-cert — cheapest corner closure |
| **L(37) order-4 multiplier corner** | Enumeration "within reach" | trivial | Completes the KM level table |
| **Stage 0 certified pipeline** | Lean encoding theorem + proof-logged 625-class re-derivation + re-certify class 109 (CP-SAT emits no proof) | <$1k compute, 2–4 eng-months | Prerequisite for any certified theorem; converts existing assets into checked cube cover |
| **Stage 1 certified Z₃₇ sweep** | Full lifts, 625 classes, VeriPB/LRAT, cake_lpr | ~1.4e6 core-h ≈ **$30–150k** (point $57k spot) | Theorem "no srg(333,166,82,83) admits an order-37 automorphism" — CFSG-free, publishable; does NOT touch H(668) |

Not purchasable: Stage 2c involutions ($0.5–5M, feasibility uncertain); Stage 3 rigid case (blocked on a missing "Lam lemma for 333", deficit ≥ 30 orders of magnitude beyond the universal computation bound).

---

## 4. THE PROFILE (constraint web a hypothetical H(668) must satisfy)

Deduplicated from the three profile agents; each line cited to its proving artifact.

**Arithmetic (all gates pass — the object is arithmetically generic):**
- 668=2²·167; 667=23·29, 333=3²·37 not prime powers ⇒ no Paley I/II [profile_scan_333.py]
- BRC/conference gate: 334≡2 mod 4, 333=18²+3² [van Lint–Seidel 1966; re-verified]
- ord₁₆₇(2)=83 odd ⇒ field descent structurally silent [Schmidt JAMS 1999; verified]
- Hasse: (668,668)₁₆₇=−1 killed by even C(668,2)=222778 [hasse_668_verify.py]
- Excess σ(H) ≤ 17212 with column sums ≡0 mod 4, Σc²=668² (feasible witness exists) [sweep #1]

**Forced invariants (constant — zero discriminating power, but every H(668) must realize them):**
- SNF = diag(1, 2³³³, 334³³³, 668); rank₂=1 (H≡J mod 2) [Newman 1971; snf_668_verify.py]
- Binary code of (H+J)/2 = E₆₆₈; design 2-rank full; Z₄ code = Klemm K₆₆₈, Type I; lattice D₆₆₈⁺ [code_mass_668.py]
- Self-dual [668,334] code over F₁₆₇ (the only H-dependent code; ambient family non-empty)
- If two-circulant (LP(333)): PSD_u(s)+PSD_v(s)=668 ∀s≠0; cube-root values in the 16-element set {16,…,652} ≡4 mod 12, 8 Loeschian pairs summing to 167 [Kotsireas–Koutschan 2021; re-derived]; mod-37 split (m_u,m_v) with realized certificates {37,325,613}; joint CRT gate provably open (Gauss-sum witnesses) [mech: LP mod-37]

**Symmetry constraints on any srg(333,166,82,83) (conference route only — sufficient, not necessary):**
- Not group-developed (eigenvalue field) [paper Lemma lem:cayley, Lean-verified support]
- Every order-37 automorphism fpf; 37²∤|Aut|; no fpf 3-power [paper props fpf/no3]
- 15 primes excluded as automorphism orders (all p≡3 mod 4, 167≤p≤331, incl. 167 itself); order-3 elements fix ≥3 (≡3 mod 6) vertices; order-83 fixes 1 or 167 [profile_scan_333.py]
- Mod CFSG: vertex-transitive ⇒ fpf Z₃₇ ⇒ one of exactly 625 cataloged skeleton classes [paper cor:vt + census]
- Within the catalog: no H-cyclotomic structure |H|≥4 (6 subgroups empty, certified); orders 2/3 pinned to a=4, order-3 to 4 skeletons; self-complementary to classes 221/422 (109 closed); fixed diagonal block D₇₇ must be exactly Paley QR or complement, with coupling (C1)/(C2) [mech: SA-floor, new]
- fpf Z₃₇ ⇒ 3-rank(A−I) ≤ 149 (vs 167 generic), rank₃((A−I)²)=1, (A−I)³≡0 [mech: I5, new]
- Multiplier groups ⊆ QR; near-multiplier counts F₀(u) ≥ 198 (u∈QR), ≤1332 (u∈QNR, defect ≥162), F₀ PSD on Z₃₆ [mech: twisted moments, new]
- α, ω ≤ 18 (Hoffman/ratio); relative bound met with equality (forced tight two-graph) [sweep #5/#8]

**Construction-family exclusions:** not Paley/Mathon/Balonin–Seberry; not Z₆₆₇-developed core (DS kill); no abelian RDS(668,2,668,334) — cocyclic ⇔ Williamson(167) ∪ Ito(167) exactly [BACD 2019 + sweep #3/#9]; not unbordered two-block-circulant (a²+b²=668 insoluble); not circulant (Turyn 1965); every Kronecker/composition route dead (odd part prime) [corner catalog B11].

**Composite portrait:** an existing H(668) is most plausibly either (i) an LP(333) at the annealed existence threshold (E≈2^−1.37) with the exact 16-value cube-root spectrum, or (ii) a combinatorially feral, nearly-asymmetric srg — invisible to all trace-linear invariants (Lean-verified collapse theorem), gripped by no proven tool.

---

## 5. DECISION GUIDANCE ($100k DO credits)

**Should any DNE-specific spend happen now? Yes — but small, gated, and front-loaded on items that pay off either way. Do not commit Stage 1 yet.**

Recommended DNE-specific tranche now (~**$2–6k + ~1 engineer-month**), in order:
1. **$0 — Eades 1977 retrieval** (closes corner B13). Also **fix the verified erratum** in PROBLEM_ANALYSIS_668.md §2 and fold corner_catalog_verify_668.py into the paper.
2. **~$100–1k — L(111) decision** via the Eisenstein reformulation. The only KM-shaped surface with asymmetric upside; expected feasible, but it is the lone cheap computation in the entire portfolio whose negative outcome is a global kill. **Gate: before publicizing any L(111)-infeasibility consequence, re-audit the H(668) ⟺ LP(333) converse** — the adversarial brief flags that LP(333) ⇒ two-circulant H(668) is standard but the converse "every H(668) yields an LP(333)" needs verification; route no DNE claim through it unaudited.
3. **~$200–500 — sc_pinned_cpsat at full budget** (12 runs) + the gated $100 SAT+CAS pilot (IPASIR-UP propagator) on classes 221/422, plus the projector-Gram SDP and L(37) order-4 corner. Closes (or honestly fails to close) the last finite open corner of the symmetric sector.
4. **~$1k + eng time — Stage 0 of the BOM** (certified cube cover, re-certify class 109 with a real proof). This is paper-quality infrastructure regardless of DNE outcome.

**Defer Stage 1 ($30–150k, BOM point estimate $57k)** until: (a) the pilot in item 3 shows tractable certified branching on the 415-bit instances, and (b) it is accepted that the deliverable is "no Z₃₇-symmetric srg(333,166,82,83)" — a strong publishable theorem that nonetheless does **not** constrain H(668) (conference route sufficient-only, and even within the srg the Z₃₇ corner is measure 2^−53784 of the two-graph space). At ~60% of the credit pool for a non-H(668)-binding theorem, it should compete against the existence-search portfolio, not be reflexively funded.

**Never fund:** Stage 2c involutions ($0.5–5M, uncertain), Stage 3 rigid case (mathematically blocked), mass-formula/switching-count obstructions (proven circular), star-complement adaptations (provably maximally mismatched), or any re-proposal from the proven-blind list.

**Allocation across the whole pool** (concurring with the odds agent): ~70% to existence search (TT(56)/BS(84,83)/Williamson(167)/cocyclic SAT+CAS with the new KK 8-pair PSD filter and the Paley-pinning conditions as cuts — both banked here as search accelerators), ~30% to finishing the certified catalog (items 1–4 above + paper). The catalog is the one output guaranteed to retain value under every resolution of the conjecture.

---

## 6. HONEST PROBABILITIES

Synthesizing the odds agent with this sweep's results (which strengthened "obstruction side provably empty-handed" beyond what the odds agent had):

| Proposition | P | Basis |
|---|---|---|
| H(668) exists | **0.92** | Community prior ~0.97 shaved by threshold position (LP(333) at −1.4 to −10.4 annealed bits, *first* frontier order past the generic threshold), emptied algebraic sectors, and 167's construction-hostility; not shaved more because the closed sectors are exponentially thin, the threshold sign is inside model error (LP(347) scores −6.6 bits and provably exists), and every obstruction is now *certified* blind — base rate of "smallest open order" falling (92, 268, 428, 764) is unbroken |
| srg(333,166,82,83) / C(334) exists | **0.40** | No construction; C(66) open 60+ years; fpf-Z₃₇/no-Cayley results bite here; H(668) does not need it |
| Any nonexistence proof of H(668) within 5 years (any budget) | **<0.01** | Requires machinery that this report certifies does not exist; the rigid sector is blocked by mathematics, not compute |
| L(111) infeasible (the one cheap global kill) | **~0.02–0.05** | All sibling levels feasible with witnesses; near-miss structure (496 vs 495) is suggestive but not load-bearing; priced in because the test costs ~nothing |
| Classes 221/422 closed (either direction) within 1 year at ≤$5k | **~0.35** | CDCL UNKNOWN universally at 2.5h, but the new (C1)/(C2) pinning is a genuine 2⁹-fold+ reduction not yet tried at full budget |
| Stage 1 theorem ("no Z₃₇-symmetric srg(333)") achievable at $30–150k | **~0.5–0.6 feasible-as-budgeted**, conditional on pilot; truth of the statement itself ~0.85 | Branching uncertainty 2–20×; glassy floors cut both ways |
| H(668) or srg(333) decided either way within 5 years at ~$100k | **0.07** | Odds agent's figure, endorsed: ~5% lucky constructive hit, <1% DNE, ~1–2% srg decided |

**Bottom line.** The DNE attempt returned the expected null with unexpected completeness: 12 machineries certified cannot-fire-or-pass at 668 (≈10 of them never before instantiated there in print), 8 mechanisms exhausted with banked side-theorems (Paley-pinning, 3-rank ≤ 149, F₀ bounds, the 8-pair KK spectrum, the 12-group cocyclic kill table), one corner kill confirmed as prior art, and a precise statement of why the remaining gap is a mathematics gap. That catalog — "here is every obstruction, here is the verified computation at 668, here is the proof it cannot fire" — is the publishable core, and the correct posture is to publish it, spend the small gated DNE tranche (§5 items 1–4, ~$2–6k), and direct the bulk of the credits at existence.
